cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the question carefully. The question is asking why the text uses a lot of figures (numbers). The options are: (A) record the valuable data (B) provide concrete evidence (C) introduce a research method (D) give a detailed description First, I need to understand what the text is doing with the figures. Let me look through the text again. The text discusses the growth of credit card ownership in China.
